prompt: A warm, cozy Japanese home evening scene photographed in a natural lifestyle style. In the foreground, a right hand holds up a tall clear pint glass of golden beer with a thick creamy white foam head, positioned slightly right of center as if making a solo toast. In the softly blurred background, a small clay pot of oden simmers on a portable tabletop gas stove, with clearly visible ingredients including 1 shiitake mushroom, 2 round white items, several tofu pieces, and other assorted simmered items in broth. The setting is a tatami room with warm ambient indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, and a relaxed intimate atmosphere. Overlay large white handwritten Japanese text across the image reading 今日も\nおつかれさま。, in an emotional hand-drawn marker style with uneven strokes, casual spacing, and a personal note-like feel. Emphasize comforting colors, soft bokeh, realistic skin tones, and the contrast between the crisp beer glass and the gently out-of-focus hot pot behind it.
